content.query:
SELECT 

*
,Case
when end_date >= '2020-08-01 00:00:00' then 'Aug End'
when start_date < '2020-07-01 00:00:00' then 'June Start'
else 'July start and end' end as absence_cat

FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[hr_absences]

WHERE 
(end_date >= '2020-07-01 00:00:00'
and end_date <= '2020-07-31 00:00:00')
OR
(start_date >= '2020-07-01 00:00:00'
and start_date <= '2020-07-31 00:00:00')



--SELECT top(100) * FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[hr_absences]
